title: Start Here
desc: Build an AI thinking environment for your work category.

title: Scenario Index
desc: Choose a scenario by audience category, work burden, operation, and native artefact.

title: AI Literature Summary Verification for Researchers
desc: Use an Adjoint Thinking environment to check AI-assisted literature summaries before they enter a paper, review, lecture, or research note.

title: AI Pitch Deck Claim Verification for Founders
desc: Check AI-assisted market claims before they appear in a pitch deck, investor memo, or fundraising email.

title: AI Startup Screening Workflow for Angel Investors
desc: Use AI to screen a startup pitch without accepting the model’s verdict about the company.

title: AI Fiction Co-Writing Without Losing Original Voice
desc: Generate fictional alternatives without letting the model average away voice, taste, or the story’s original pressure.

title: AI Source-Grounded Lecture Builder for Educators
desc: Turn source material into a lecture without allowing AI to replace evidence, structure, or teaching judgment.

title: AI Client Memo Verification for Consultants
desc: Check an AI-assisted client memo before it becomes professional advice, analysis, or recommendation.

title: AI Design Review Reasoning Workflow for Engineers
desc: Use AI to inspect a design-review argument without allowing generated reasoning to certify technical safety.

title: AI Decision Memo Synthesis for Analysts
desc: Build a decision memo from mixed evidence without smoothing uncertainty into false confidence.

title: AI Learning Without Outsourcing Understanding for Students
desc: Use AI as a learning aid while preserving first contact, effort, and human understanding.

title: AI Controlled Divergence for Artists and Creators
desc: Use AI to generate visual or conceptual possibilities without surrendering taste, pressure, or authorship.

title: First Contact Pressure Ledger
desc: Protects the first human encounter with the work before AI frames it.

title: Cognitive Jurisdiction Map
desc: Separates what stays human, what may be shared with AI, and what is dangerous without verification.

title: Living Dossier Provenance Audit
desc: Keeps sources, claims, summaries, machine syntheses, and human judgments traceable.

title: Reasoning Path Ledger
desc: Borrows reasoning paths without accepting the model’s verdict.

title: Controlled Divergence Chamber
desc: Generates possibilities while keeping them provisional until tested by craft, evidence, or judgment.

title: Verification Receipt
desc: Checks AI-assisted claims before they leave the private workspace.

title: Synthesis Wall
desc: Places fragments into a defensible structure without letting the machine’s outline decide meaning.

title: Invention Forge Transformation Log
desc: Turns outputs into original work through constraint, test, revision, and responsibility.

title: Sovereignty Receipt
desc: Records what the machine may support and what the human must still decide.

title: Pressure Ledger
desc: A record of the first human mark: the question, doubt, sketch, pressure, or discomfort that must exist before AI assistance.

title: Claim–Source–Boundary Table
desc: A compact verification artefact that separates a claim, the source path, the exact support, the boundary, and the trust label.

title: Reasoning Path Ledger
desc: A ledger for borrowing causal, formal, analogical, adversarial, or experimental paths without adopting the verdict.

title: Living Dossier
desc: A traceable project memory that preserves source claims, boundaries, contradictions, machine syntheses, and human judgments.

title: Synthesis Wall
desc: A structured wall that places fragments by material type, trust status, and function in the work.

title: Transformation Log
desc: A record of how a candidate output changed under pressure, constraint, test, and responsibility.

title: Receipt Before Release
desc: The operating habit that no AI-assisted output should leave the private workspace until its trust status is known.

title: Source Is Not the Citation
desc: A citation exists only as decoration unless the source supports the exact claim, strength, and boundary used.

title: Orientation, Working, Publication
desc: Three trust levels that prevent private orientation material from being mistaken for public-ready evidence.

title: Dangerous Zone
desc: The class of tasks where fluent output may look shareable but requires verification, expert review, or reality contact before use.

title: Human Verdict
desc: The non-delegable decision to keep, narrow, cut, publish, sign, teach, release, or refuse.

title: Machine as Cognitive Environment
desc: The idea that a language model changes the conditions of attention, memory, reasoning, imagination, verification, and authorship.

desc: Browser-only setup guide for ChatGPT Projects.

desc: Browser-only setup guide for Claude Projects.

desc: Browser-only setup guide for Gemini Gems.

title: License Summary
desc: Personal, self-learning, and academic research use are permitted. Commercial asset production requires a KNOWDYN license.

title: Security and Privacy Notes
desc: Prompt packs are not secure data-processing systems. Do not upload secrets or regulated data without understanding platform controls.

title: Commercial Use and Licensing
desc: Commercial asset production, paid assistants, client work, internal business assets, courses, and marketplace products require a commercial license from KNOWDYN.
